summary: Decompiled seven stage-layer functions across granime, Corneria, Kongo Jungle, Home-Run Contest, Dream Land/Old Pupupu, and Rainbow Cruise, replacing placeholder asm markers with C and tightening several prototypes/struct layouts. The PR body claims all seven matched by an overnight script; the decomp.dev bot slice only shows one new 100% match and several near-100% improvements, so exact match status is partially conflicting in the available evidence.

key_files.role: Added baselib/aobj include and decompiled grAnime_801C83D0 as an AObj flag check.
Decompiled grCorneria_801DDDA8 and moved local Corneria data typedefs earlier for reuse.
Replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with void grCorneria_801DDDA8(HSD_GObj*, Vec3*).
Decompiled static collision callback fn_801D7700 and bool query grKongo_801D7F78.
Typed grKongo_801D7E78 as Vec3* grKongo_801D7E78(HSD_GObj*, Vec3*) to support callers.
Extended grKg_804D6980 static struct with unk9C, unkA0, and unkA4.
Added grHr_804D6AD8 and decompiled grHomeRun_8021EDD4 language-dependent distance/tick setup.
Added small animation-index tables and decompiled grOldPupupu_80210A24.
Added extern grRc_804D4790 and decompiled grRCruise_80200074 platform/joint initialization.
Introduced grRCruise_SubEntry and replaced grRCruise_GroundVars pad_3C[0x30] with x3C[3].

what_changed: grAnime_801C83D0 now calls grAnime_801C8318, tests HSD_AObjGetFlags(aobj) & 0x40000000, and returns bool.

grCorneria_801DDDA8 now computes an output Vec3 from a stage GObj, Ground data, JObj world position, Corneria offset data, and clamps y to at least 100.0f; NULL input zeroes the vector before the clamp.
Corneria header signature for grCorneria_801DDDA8 was made concrete, and grCn_Entry/grCn_Data typedefs were moved from later in grcorneria.c to before the newly decompiled function.
grHomeRun_8021EDD4 now sets Home-Run globals using JP vs non-JP language constants, ratio math, rounded tick count, a minimum tick count of 1.0F, and Ground_801C0498().

fn_801D7700 in grkongo.c now handles a collision/path callback by selecting one of 15 segments between mp vertices 0x1D and 0x1A, clamping the segment index, and adding a radians-scaled value from grKg_804D6980->unkA4 to grKg_803E188C[idx].unk10.
grKongo_801D7F78 now scans HSD_GObj_Entities->x14, skips self and invalid position lookups, and returns true when another Kongo object is within the observed dz and dx thresholds.
grOldPupupu_80210A24 now clears gp->gv.unk.xD0 and selects an animation table based on gp->gv.unk.xC8 when grOp_804D6A9C is zero.

grRCruise_80200074 now initializes Rainbow Cruise subentries in a three-iteration loop: starts animations, stores joint ids, installs mpJointSetCb1 callback fn_80200460, stores JObjs, and zeroes state fields.
types.h gained a 0x10-byte grRCruise_SubEntry layout so grRCruise_GroundVars can expose x3C[3] instead of opaque padding.
smart_moves: Converted unknown prototypes in headers only where the diff had enough call-site evidence, reducing future UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS surface without broad renaming.
Promoted Rainbow Cruise's 0x30-byte padding into three typed 0x10-byte subentries exactly matching the looped initialization pattern in grRCruise_80200074.
Extended grKg_804D6980 only through the needed unkA4 field instead of overclaiming names or a full struct layout.
Used partial Corneria data structs plus explicit pad-offset casts for known offsets, preserving matchability while avoiding invented field names.
Kept file-local helpers/data static where appropriate, including static fn_801D7700 and grOp animation tables.
Added the precise baselib/aobj.h include needed for HSD_AObjGetFlags instead of relying on indirect declarations.
decomp_lessons: Stage decomp often depends on typing neighboring helper functions first; grKongo_801D7F78 needed grKongo_801D7E78 typed as Vec3*(HSD_GObj*, Vec3*).
When a stage variable block is not fully understood, partial structs with named pads and explicit offset casts can be safer than speculative field names.
Repeated per-joint state blocks should be converted from raw padding to fixed-size subentry arrays once a loop reveals stride and fields.
Small .sdata tables such as grOp_804D48A0/grOp_804D48A8/grOp_804D48B0 can be necessary to make simple animation dispatch callbacks match.
Language-dependent constants can affect stage setup logic; grHomeRun_8021EDD4 branches on lbLang_IsSavedLanguageJP() and uses different scale/max distance values.
Even successful function decomp can perturb data-section matching; the bot reported improvements to .sdata/.sdata2 but regressions in grkongo .sdata2 and grhomerun .sbss.
naming_conventions: Stage file prefixes remained address-based and subsystem-prefixed: grAnime_, grCorneria_, grKongo_, grHomeRun_, grOldPupupu_, grRCruise_.
Static/global data names follow existing stage abbreviations: grCn_, grHr_, grKg_, grOp_, grRc_.
Unknown fields were left as unk/x-offset names such as unkA4, x3C, x02, x0C rather than prematurely given semantic names.
Concrete signatures replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS when known, while still retaining address comments in headers.
New Rainbow Cruise type used a subsystem-specific name, struct grRCruise_SubEntry, colocated with grRCruise_GroundVars in types.h.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(4) and PAD_STACK(16), plus an unused stack buffer in grCorneria_801DDDA8, to preserve stack layout.
Kept nested block scopes around temporary f32 values in grkongo.c, likely to control lifetimes/register allocation.
Duplicated integer cast locals idx and idx2 in fn_801D7700 before clamping, matching the emitted control flow more closely than a simplified clamp helper.
Preserved exact float literal forms and constants such as 0.017453292F, 15.0F, 160.0F, 0.5F, 100.0F, and 6400.0F.
Used direct pointer casts into pad arrays for Corneria offsets at 0x3C, 0x330, 0x334, and 0x338 rather than forcing an incomplete struct layout.
Structured boolean returns as explicit if/return true/return false in grAnime_801C83D0 instead of collapsing to a single expression.
review_feedback: No human reviews or review comments were present in the provided slice.
decomp.dev bot reported matched code at 59.40% (+0.01%, +220 bytes).
decomp.dev bot listed grOldPupupu_80210A24 as a new 100.00% match.
decomp.dev bot listed fn_801D7700, grKongo_801D7F78, grHomeRun_8021EDD4, grCorneria_801DDDA8, grRCruise_80200074, and grAnime_801C83D0 as improved unmatched items in the 98.98%-99.89% range.
The PR body states all seven functions were 100% matched by an overnight script, but the bot comment in this slice does not fully corroborate that exact claim.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename or document grRCruise_SubEntry fields x00/x02/x04/x08/x0C.
Search for later cleanup of grCn_Data pad offsets 0x3C/0x330/0x334/0x338 in Corneria.
Check whether grKg_804D6980 unk9C/unkA0/unkA4 were later named or moved into a broader Kongo stage data struct.
Compare later decomp.dev reports for these six near-100% functions to resolve the PR-body versus bot-report match-status discrepancy.
Search for additional users of grAnime_801C83D0 as a generic stage animation completion checker.
